perk.surpriseDescriptionNext: Check out your rewards and how to earn more.

card.title: Get your Peanut Card
card.description: Closed beta. Badges skip the line. $10 unlocks on your first $100 spend.

invite.title: Invite friends. Earn rewards
invite.description: Earn rewards every time your friends use Peanut.

notifications.title: Stay in the loop!
notifications.description: Turn on notifications and get alerts for all your wallet activity.
notifications.blockedToast: Notifications blocked by your browser. Enable them in site settings and reload.

iosPwa.title: Add Peanut to your home screen

qrPay.title: Pay with QR code payments
qrPay.description: Get the best exchange rate, pay like a local and earn rewards.

latamInvite.title: Earn rewards on QR payments
latamInvite.description: Invite friends to earn more rewards. The more they use, the more you earn!

bugBounty.title: Help us improve and get $5!
bugBounty.description: Report a bug. Get rewarded! No questions asked.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.

regions.title: Unlocked regions
regions.description: Transfer to and receive from any bank account and use supported payments methods.

empty.title: No regions unlocked yet
empty.description: Tap a region below to confirm your ID and unlock payments there.

regions.lockedDescription: Where do you want to send and receive money?

providerRejection.fixableDescription: Please upload a clearer photo of your ID to unlock this region.
providerRejection.restartDescription: This region needs a document from a supported country. You can verify with a different ID.
providerRejection.unavailableDescription: This region is not available for your account. Contact support for help.

initError.fallbackDescription: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.

nonCustodial.title: Non-custodial wallet
nonCustodial.description: Only you control this wallet. We can't recover it if you lose access. Your backup is your responsibility.

step2.title: Find Password Manager
step2.description: Autofill → Google Password Manager → Turn ON sync

noBackupWarning.title: No backup = No recovery
noBackupWarning.description: If you lose your phone without backup enabled, your money is gone forever.

faq.losePhone: What if I lose my phone?
faq.exportKeys: Why can't I export my private key?

losePhoneModal.enabledDescription: Sign into your new phone with your {platform, select, android {Google account} other {Apple ID}}. Download Peanut. Your wallet restores automatically
losePhoneModal.noBackupDescription: Your funds are permanently lost, we can't recover your wallet. This is how self-custody works.

changePhoneModal.step1: Verify backup is working (check step 3 above)
changePhoneModal.step2: {platform, select, android {Know your Google account password} other {Know your Apple ID password}}
changePhoneModal.step3: Keep old phone until new one works
changePhoneModal.androidToAndroidDescription: Sign into Google. Your wallet follows.
changePhoneModal.crossPlatformDescription: Create new wallet on new device. Transfer your funds. Passkeys don't work cross-platform unless you are using a third party password manager such as 1Password.

exportKeysModal.saferIntro: Unlike traditional private keys that can be copied as text, passkeys are cryptographic credentials that can't be:

bullets.noteApp: Saved in an unsafe note app

exportKeysModal.tradeoffDescription: You get better security, but passkeys are locked to your device ecosystem (Apple or Google). That's why cloud backup is critical.
exportKeysModal.futureNote: We're exploring advanced export options for power users in future updates.

publicProfile.allSetDescription: Now send or request money to get started.
publicProfile.inviteOnlyLine2: Go beg your friend for an invite link!
publicProfile.begShareText: Bro… I’m on my knees. Peanut is invite-only and I’m locked outside. Save my life and send me your invite
publicProfile.activityPrivateNote: Activity is only visible for you, it is not public.

deleteAccount.confirmDescription: Deleting your account is permanent. We'll switch it off right away and wipe your data within 30 days. This little guy would really rather you stayed.
deleteAccount.doneDescription: Your account is off and your data will be gone within 30 days. Thanks for cracking open Peanut with us — take care out there!
deleteAccount.error: Could not delete your account. Please try again.

limits.pageDescription: Payment limits control how much you can send and receive. Limits vary by region and reset monthly or yearly.

unsupported-browser.description: Please open Peanut in your device's main browser (Safari, Chrome, Firefox) to continue setup. If you are already in your main browser your device may not support Peanut.

android-initial-pwa-install.title: Get the full experience
android-initial-pwa-install.description: Keep your wallet one tap away. Safe, fast, and on your home screen.

pwa-install.title: Install Peanut on your phone
pwa-install.description: Please install Peanut on your phone for the best experience!

landing.title: Peanut makes dollars easy.
landing.description: Create your wallet in seconds to save, send, or cash out dollars fast.

welcome.title: Peanut is invite-only
welcome.description: Who invited you? Enter their username to continue, or join the waitlist and we'll reach out when you're eligible.

signup.title: How should we call you?
signup.description: Choose your username. It'll be your ID to send and receive money.

passkey-permission.title: Let's set up your passkey
passkey-permission.description: Use your face or fingerprint to log in. No passwords, no hassle. Just you.

sign-test-transaction.title: Your account is ready
sign-test-transaction.description: Just confirm it's you — one tap and you're in.

existingSession.title: You're already signed in

braveInstall.title: Success!
braveInstall.description: Please open the Peanut app from your home screen to continue setup.

landing.recoverWallet: Need to recover your Peanut wallet?

errors.tooShort: Username must be at least 4 characters long

errors.checkFailedSupport: Failed to check handle availability. Please try again or contact support.

passkey.notAvailable: Passkeys aren’t available on this device yet. Please try again.
passkey.cancelled: Passkey setup was cancelled. Please try again when ready.
passkey.usernameTaken: This username is already registered — possibly from an earlier attempt on this device. If that was you, your passkey is ready: just log in.
passkey.learnMore: Learn more about what Passkeys are

descriptions.notReadable: There's an issue with your device's passkey settings. Please try again.
descriptions.notAllowedAndroid: We couldn’t create a passkey. This usually means you’re not signed in to a Google account, Google Play Services is out of date, or screen lock isn’t set up. Fix one of these and retry — or it may have been cancelled.
descriptions.notAllowed: Passkeys are not enabled on your device. Check your device settings to enable them
descriptions.invalidState: A passkey already exists for this account on your device.
descriptions.default: Something went wrong during passkey setup. This is likely a device issue.

qrPay.waitingForMerchant: Waiting for the merchant to set the amount

orderNotReady.title: We couldn't get the amount
orderNotReady.description: Ask the merchant to enter it and scan the QR again.

maintenance.title: Service Temporarily Unavailable
maintenance.description: We're experiencing issues with {method} payments due to an external provider outage. We're working to restore service as soon as possible.

kyc.unlockDescription: Confirm your ID to pay with a QR code. Takes about a minute.
kyc.inProgressDescription: We're confirming your ID. Pick up where you left off and you'll be paying in no time.
kyc.fixableDescription: We need an updated document to enable QR payments. Please upload a clearer photo of your ID.
kyc.restartDescription: QR payments need a document from a supported country. You can verify with a different ID.
kyc.blockedDescription: QR payments are not available for your account. Contact support for help.

info.exchangeRateTooltip: Rate shown is current but may vary slightly (~$1-5 ARS) until payment is confirmed.
info.saveVsCardTooltipBrl: Foreign cards pay IOF (~3.5%) plus a typical ~3% issuer FX fee. Peanut routes via PIX at the current market rate.
info.saveVsCardTooltipArs: Foreign cards apply the official rate plus a typical ~3% issuer FX fee. Peanut routes via MercadoPago at the current market rate.

success.earnedHoldToClaim: You earned ${amount}! Hold to claim your reward.
success.holdToClaim: You earned a reward! Hold to claim.
success.earnedInviteFriends: You earned ${amount}! Invite friends to earn even more.
success.inviteFriends: Invite friends to earn even more rewards.

errors.pixMinAmount: This Pix charge is below the {amount} BRL minimum for Pix payments.
errors.pixRecurring: This QR code is for a recurring payment (PIX Automático). Peanut doesn't support recurring PIX payments — please ask for a regular PIX QR code instead.
errors.pixDecode: We could not decode this Pix QR code. Please ask the merchant to generate a new one.
errors.genericDecode: We could not decode this particular QR code. Please ask the Merchant if they can generate a Mercado Pago QR
errors.providerIssues: We are currently experiencing issues with {method} payments. We are working to fix it as soon as possible
errors.initiateUnexpected: Could not initiate payment due to unexpected error. Please contact support
errors.fetchDetails: Could not fetch qr payment details
errors.cardAuthNeeded: One-time card authorization needed. You'll be asked to confirm once.
errors.accountStateChanged: Transaction failed due to account state change. Please try again. If the problem persists, contact support.
errors.sessionExpired: Payment session expired. Please scan the QR code again.
errors.merchantNotSupported: This specific QR code or merchant is not supported. Please try again with a different QR code.
errors.completeFailed: Could not complete payment. Please scan the QR code again. If problem persists contact support
errors.minMantecaAmount: Payment amount must be at least ${amount}
errors.maxQrAmount: QR payment amount exceeds maximum limit of ${amount}
errors.minQrAmount: QR payment amount must be at least ${amount}
errors.genericQrDetails: An error occurred while getting the QR details.

claim.alreadyClaimed: This QR code has already been claimed by another user.
claim.notAvailable: This QR code is not available for claiming.
claim.inviteQrDescription: Share anywhere. Points keep coming from the activity of friends & their friends.
claim.holdToClaim: Hold to make it yours forever
claim.claimFailed: Failed to claim QR code. Please try again.

claimSuccess.title: This QR is now yours!
claimSuccess.description: Your sticker is now linked to your profile forever.
claimSuccess.stickerDescription: Stick it on your laptop, water bottle, or anywhere you want people to find you. Anyone who scans will be able to join Peanut with your invite and contribute towards your points forever.
claimSuccess.shareText: Scan my QR code to connect with me on Peanut!

entry.title: Spend anywhere Visa is accepted
entry.description: Use your balance at 150M+ merchants. Online, contactless, yours.

status.pendingBody: Hang tight while we finish setting up your card. This usually takes a few seconds.
status.manualReviewBody: We need to do a manual review of your submission. This usually takes 1-2 days and we'll let you know when it's ready.
status.requiresInfoBody: Our team will help you finish your card application — message support to continue.
status.requiresSupportTitle: Something went wrong on our side
status.requiresSupportBody: We hit a snag while processing your card application. Our team needs to take a look — message support and we'll get you sorted.
status.rejectedTitle: We couldn't issue you a card
status.rejectedBody: You can still use Peanut freely to deposit, withdraw, and pay with crypto.

celebration.headlineOg: OG access. You skipped the line.
celebration.headlineDevconnect: Devconnect crew. You skipped the line.
celebration.sublineBadge: You hold a badge that skips the closed-beta queue. Card’s yours.
celebration.sublineNoBadge: Welcome to the closed beta. Card’s yours.

cancel.title: Cancel card?
cancel.body: This will permanently cancel your card. It won't work for any transactions. You will have to request a new one if you change your mind.
cancel.canceledBody: If you change your mind later, you can request another card.
cancel.feedbackLabel: Help us improve our product for you
cancel.feedbackPlaceholder: Why did you cancel the card?
cancel.thanksBody: We appreciate your feedback, it helps us improve the experience of our app.

lockModal.lockBody: Card will not work for any transactions until you unlock it.
lockModal.lockSuccessBody: Come back at any time to unlock it.
lockModal.unlockBody: Your card will work again for any transactions.

errors.balanceReturnFailed: Could not return your card balance. Please try again or contact support.
errors.authorizationFailed: Card authorization failed. Please try again or contact support.
errors.walletNotReady: Wallet not ready — please retry in a moment
errors.unexpectedStrategy: Unexpected withdrawal strategy — please contact support

countryConfirm.noCandidatesTitle: We need to check your details
countryConfirm.noCandidatesBody: We couldn't confirm your country of residence from your verification. Our team will sort it out — message support to continue.
countryConfirm.title: Confirm your country of residence
countryConfirm.description: Your verification shows two different countries. Pick the one where you currently live — your card application is processed under its rules.

eligibility.title: Let's see if you qualify
eligibility.description: Press and hold the button. We're looking you up.
eligibility.holdAriaLabel: Press and hold to check eligibility

limits.subtitle: Set your per-transaction spending limit.
limits.noActiveCard: No active card to manage limits for.

pin.noPinBody: You need to set a pin before using your card for in-store purchases.
pin.hiddenNote: Your pin is hidden for security reasons.
pin.successBody: You can now use your card for in-store purchases.
pin.ruleChangeLater: You can change your PIN later

rejection.title: the door's tight tonight.
rejection.onTheList: You're on the list — we'll holler when it's your turn
rejection.joinFailed: Failed to join waitlist. Please try again.

terms.title: Card Terms
terms.cardTermsIssuer: I accept the <terms>{partner} Card Terms</terms>, and the <privacy>Issuer Privacy Policy</privacy>
terms.accuracy: I certify that the information I have provided is accurate and that I will abide by all the rules and requirements related to my {partner} Spend Card.
terms.solicitation: I acknowledge that applying for the {partner} Spend Card does not constitute unauthorized solicitation.
terms.accountOpeningPrivacy: I accept the <link>Account Opening Privacy Notice</link>

unlockHistory.badgeSubtitle: Tap to re-open your share asset
unlockHistory.publicLaunchSubtitle: Open to everyone now. Tap to share.

physical.onListBody: You are #{position} on the list. We'll let you know when cards are ready to be shipped.
physical.comingSoonBody: Join our waiting list and be amongst the first to get it.

yourCard.autoRenewBody: Your card will automatically renew in {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}, expiration date will change.
yourCard.payAsCreditBody: When a terminal asks debit or credit, choose credit — your Peanut card runs on the credit network.

page.loadFailed: Failed to load card info. Please try again.
page.setupFailed: Could not complete setup — please try again.
page.verificationSlow: Verification is taking longer than expected. Please try again.

recovery.doneBody: {amount} USDC has been returned to your peanut wallet.
recovery.title: Recover your card collateral
recovery.description: This pulls every USDC currently held in your card collateral contract back to your peanut wallet. Auto-balance is turned off as part of recovery so the rebalancer can't top up between now and the transfer.

addMoney.title: Add Money
addMoney.howWouldYouLikeToAdd: How would you like to add money?
addMoney.howMuchToAdd: How much do you want to add?
addMoney.mustMatchBankTransfer: This must exactly match what you send from your bank
addMoney.amountMustMatchBank: Amount must match what you send from your bank!
addMoney.eurAccountsOnlyDescription: Only EUR accounts with IBAN work for onramps. Your local currency account may not work.

methods.migrateFromOfframpDescription: Move your Offramp balance to Peanut
methods.cryptoDescription: Deposit from a wallet or exchange

networkDrawer.title: Choose Network
networkDrawer.description: Select Network you want to make deposit from:
networkDrawer.supportedTokens: {count, plural, one {# Supported token} other {# Supported tokens}}

supportedNetworksModal.title: Supported Networks
supportedNetworksModal.description: One address for all listed below EVM networks - send from any of them and your funds will be routed correctly.
supportedNetworksModal.warning: Sending to the wrong network or token will result in permanent loss.

howToDeposit.title: How to Deposit
howToDeposit.warning: Sending to the wrong network or token will result in permanent loss.
howToDeposit.warningOfframp: Only send USDC on Arbitrum — other tokens or networks may be lost.

default.step2: Open your wallet or exchange and start a withdrawal

offramp.step1: Copy your migration deposit address above
offramp.step2: Open your Offramp account and start a withdrawal or send
offramp.step3: Choose USDC on the Arbitrum network and paste the address
offramp.step4: Confirm and send — your balance arrives within a few minutes

crypto.title: Deposit Crypto
crypto.sendUsdcOnArbitrum: Send USDC on Arbitrum to migrate your balance
crypto.tooltipEvm: {count} EVM networks supported. For exact amounts, deposit USDC on Arbitrum. Other chains/tokens are bridged (±0.1%).
crypto.tooltipSol: Your Solana deposit address. Deposits are bridged to Arbitrum (±0.1% variance).
crypto.tooltipTron: Your Tron deposit address. Deposits are bridged to Arbitrum (±0.1% variance).
crypto.migrationAddressTooltip: Use this address for your Offramp migration. It only accepts USDC on Arbitrum — don't save it as a general wallet address.
crypto.warningDescription: Wrong token or network may cause permanent loss.
crypto.warningDescriptionOfframp: Other tokens or networks may cause permanent loss.
crypto.bridgingFeeNote: A small bridging fee (~0.1%) applies — you'll receive slightly less than you send.
crypto.multipleTransfersNote: Moving more than the max? Send it in multiple transfers.
crypto.addressErrorTitle: We couldn't prepare your deposit address
crypto.addressErrorDescription: Nothing was sent. Please try again — if this keeps happening, contact support.
crypto.marketMovedDescription: The exchange rate changed too much to complete your deposit.
crypto.marketMovedNote: Your money is on its way back to your wallet.
crypto.transferSentBackDescription: We couldn't complete your migration transfer.
crypto.transferSentBackNote: Your money was returned to your Offramp account — start the withdrawal again from there.

offrampGate.title: Which Offramp account is this?
offrampGate.description: Enter the username or email of the Offramp account you're migrating from, so we can match your balance to your new Peanut wallet.
offrampGate.error: Could not save your Offramp account. Please try again.

manteca.sendOnlyOwnAccountTitle: Send only from your own account
manteca.sendOnlyOwnAccountDescription: Deposits from third-party accounts are not supported and funds may be lost.
manteca.providerFeesInfo: Our providers and the blockchain charge a small fee for every transaction. This fee is already accounted for in the amount you see.
manteca.minDepositAmount: Deposit amount must be at least ${amount}

pix.scanWithBankApp: Scan with your bank app, or copy the PIX code.

confirmationModal.title: IMPORTANT!

confirmationModal.mismatchTitle: If the amount or reference don't match:
confirmationModal.mismatchDescription: Your deposit will fail and it will take 2 to 10 days to return to your bank and might incur fees. The reference code is single use.

to withdraw in one tap.

pixKey.heading: Enter Pix key

pixKey.info: Send to any Pix key — email, phone, CPF/CNPJ or random key.

bank.eurTitle: We send EUR to your bank
bank.eurDescription: Withdrawals are sent in EUR. Your bank may charge conversion fees or reject the transaction if EUR deposits are not supported.
bank.confirmPending: Your transfer is processing. Funds were sent on-chain successfully — this can take a few minutes to confirm. If you don’t see the withdrawal in your activity within 30 minutes, please contact support.

manteca.ownAccountOnly: You can only withdraw to accounts under your name.

errors.countryUnresolved: We couldn't determine this account's country. Please contact support.

errors.chargeFailed: Failed to create charge for withdrawal or charge ID missing.

errors.txNotPrepared: Transaction not prepared. Please try again.
errors.userDetailsMissing: User details, bridge account, or wallet address not found.

errors.cardAuthFailed: Card authorization failed. Please try again or contact support.
errors.ownAccountOnly: You can only withdraw to accounts under your name.
errors.unexpected: Withdraw failed unexpectedly. If problem persists contact support
errors.completeAccountSetup: Please complete your account setup. Go to Settings to update your profile.

cardRows.autoClosed: Automatically cancelled — the merchant didn't complete it
cardRows.authReversed: Hold released — the merchant cancelled the authorization. Funds are back on your card.
cardRows.authExpired: Hold released — the merchant didn't capture the payment in time. Funds are back on your card.

decline.limitTooLow: Card limit reached — increase your limit

nudge.usdAbroadTitle: Pay in local currency next time
nudge.usdAbroadDescription: You were charged in US dollars. When a terminal offers to bill in dollars, choose the local currency instead — Peanut's exchange rate is usually better.

bridge.depositMessageInfo: Make sure you enter this exact message as the transfer concept or description. If it's not included, the deposit can't be processed.

rewards.earnWhenFriendsUse: You earn rewards whenever your friends use Peanut!
rewards.shareInviteLinkPrompt: Send your invite link to start earning more rewards

invites.invalidCodeMessage: The invite code you are trying to use is invalid. Please check the URL and try again.
invites.skipDescription: Someone at Peanut wants you in. Create your wallet and walk straight past the line — no invite code, no queue.

invites.inviterDescription: Members-only access. Use this invite to open your wallet and start sending and receiving money globally.
invites.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Log in!
invites.emailDescription: Enter your email so we can reach you when you get access.
invites.accountNotLoaded: Account not loaded yet. Please wait a moment and try again.

invites.notificationsDescription: We'll notify you the moment you get access.

invites.acceptFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.
invites.logInDifferentAccount: Log in with a different account

badges.title: Badges
badges.emptyDescription: Earn badges as you use Peanut. Make payments, invite friends, and join events to unlock them and display them on your profile.
badges.publicProfileNote: These Badges are displayed on your public profile.
